ideation: This sequence simulates the act of playing cricket, focusing on the swing of the bat.  The animation will emphasize the backswing, the downswing, and the follow-through. The left arm will act as a counterbalance. Frame 1 shows a preparatory pose, Frame 2 shows the backswing, Frame 3 the downswing and Frame 4 the follow-through. Frame 5 returns to a neutral position.  The robot will not have a realistic grip on the bat, but the arm movements will suggest the action.

frames.beat: arms rest, ready for the pitch
the right arm swings back, preparing to strike
a powerful downswing with the imaginary bat
the arms follow through the sweeping motion
both arms return to a relaxed, neutral stance
